tweets.text: Problem worth solving: Whistleblower platforms like SecureDrop still require trusting the receiving organization's server. If that server is compromised or legally compelled, identities can be exposed retroactively.

What if a whistleblower could prove "I work at Company X" without revealing who they are? ZK proofs make this cryptographically possible. The gap is a usable submission platform built on it. Idea surfaced from three recent signals.

libertas.fgu.tech/ideas/anonymous-whistleblower-submission-platform-with-zk-proofs

source_title: Anonymous Whistleblower Submission Platform with ZK Proofs
